description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build examples with PlatformIO that runs on every pull request, excluding changes to boards.txt, tools/boards.txt.py, and doc/. The workflow checks out the repository with submodules, sets up Python 3.x, and caches tools/dist, ~/.cache/pip, and ~/.platformio/.cache. It then installs PlatformIO, selects 10 random Arduino sketches, and builds them using the platformio builder.
